panels.title: Avg Scope Change %
panels.description: Average % of story points added or removed after sprint start (lower = more stable plans). Target: ≤ 10%

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(
  100.0 * (COALESCE(added.sp,0) + COALESCE(removed.sp,0))
  / NULLIF(snap.total_story_points,0)
)::numeric, 1) AS value
FROM sprints s
JOIN sprint_snapshots snap ON snap.sprint_id = s.id AND snap.snapshot_type = 'start'
LEFT JOIN (SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points_at_add,0)) AS sp FROM sprint_issues WHERE was_in_initial_scope = FALSE AND removed_at IS NULL GROUP BY sprint_id) added ON added.sprint_id = s.id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points_at_add,0)) AS sp FROM sprint_issues WHERE removed_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sprint_id) removed ON removed.sprint_id = s.id
WHERE s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT si.sprint_id FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key WHERE i.project_key IN ($project)) AND s.state = 'closed' AND snap.total_story_points > 0
AND date_trunc('quarter', COALESCE(s.complete_date, s.start_date)) = '$quarter'::date

panels.title: Avg Planning Accuracy %
panels.description: Average % of committed story points delivered (delivery % per sprint). Target: ≥ 80%

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(delivery_pct)::numeric, 1) AS value
FROM v_planning_deviation pd
WHERE pd.sprint_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT si.sprint_id FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key WHERE i.project_key IN ($project))
AND pd.state = 'closed' AND pd.delivery_pct IS NOT NULL
AND date_trunc('quarter', COALESCE(pd.complete_date, pd.start_date)) = '$quarter'::date

panels.title: Ticket Reopens
panels.description: Issues sent back from testing to In Progress this quarter. Lower = better quality.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT COUNT(DISTINCT t.issue_key) AS value
FROM issue_transitions t JOIN issues i ON i.key = t.issue_key
WHERE i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND LOWER(t.from_status) LIKE '%test%'
  AND LOWER(t.to_status) LIKE '%progress%'
  AND date_trunc('quarter', t.transitioned_at) = '$quarter'::date

panels.title: Avg Blocker Resolution Time
panels.description: Average hours from creation to resolution for Blocker-priority issues. Target: ≤ 1 sprint.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (resolved_at - created_at))/3600.0)::numeric, 1) AS value
FROM issues
WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND priority = 'Blocker'
  AND resolved_at IS NOT NULL
  AND date_trunc('quarter', resolved_at) = '$quarter'::date

panels.title: Scope Change % per Sprint
panels.description: Story points added + removed after sprint start as % of committed SP. Target ≤ 10%.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT s.name AS "Sprint",
  COALESCE(ROUND(100.0*(COALESCE(added.sp,0)+COALESCE(removed.sp,0))/NULLIF(snap.total_story_points,0)::numeric,1),0) AS "Scope Change %",
  COALESCE(added.cnt,0) AS "Issues Added",
  COALESCE(removed.cnt,0) AS "Issues Removed"
FROM sprints s
JOIN sprint_snapshots snap ON snap.sprint_id = s.id AND snap.snapshot_type = 'start'
LEFT JOIN (SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points_at_add,0)) AS sp, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sprint_issues WHERE was_in_initial_scope=FALSE AND removed_at IS NULL GROUP BY sprint_id) added ON added.sprint_id=s.id
LEFT JOIN (SELECT sprint_id, SUM(COALESCE(story_points_at_add,0)) AS sp, COUNT(*) AS cnt FROM sprint_issues WHERE removed_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY sprint_id) removed ON removed.sprint_id=s.id
WHERE s.id IN (SELECT DISTINCT si.sprint_id FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key = si.issue_key WHERE i.project_key IN ($project)) AND s.state='closed' AND snap.total_story_points>0
AND date_trunc('quarter', COALESCE(s.complete_date, s.start_date)) = '$quarter'::date
ORDER BY s.complete_date DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Planning Accuracy % per Sprint
panels.description: Delivered story points as % of committed SP per sprint. Target ≥ 80%.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT pd.sprint_name AS "Sprint", COALESCE(pd.delivery_pct,0) AS "Planning Accuracy %"
FROM v_planning_deviation pd
WHERE pd.sprint_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT si.sprint_id FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key=si.issue_key WHERE i.project_key IN ($project))
  AND pd.state='closed'
  AND date_trunc('quarter', COALESCE(pd.complete_date, pd.start_date)) = '$quarter'::date
ORDER BY pd.complete_date DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Weekly Ticket Reopen Rate
panels.description: Issues returned from testing to In Progress per week. Spike = quality issues escaping.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT DATE_TRUNC('week', t.transitioned_at) AS time, COUNT(DISTINCT t.issue_key) AS "Reopened Issues"
FROM issue_transitions t JOIN issues i ON i.key=t.issue_key
WHERE i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND LOWER(t.from_status) LIKE '%test%'
  AND LOWER(t.to_status) LIKE '%progress%'
  AND $__timeFilter(t.transitioned_at)
GROUP BY 1 ORDER BY 1

panels.title: Most Reopened Issues
panels.description: Issues that required the most rework this quarter.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT t.issue_key AS "Key", i.summary AS "Summary", i.assignee AS "Assignee",
  i.priority AS "Priority", COUNT(*) AS "Times Reopened"
FROM issue_transitions t JOIN issues i ON i.key=t.issue_key
WHERE i.project_key IN ($project)
  AND LOWER(t.from_status) LIKE '%test%'
  AND LOWER(t.to_status) LIKE '%progress%'
  AND date_trunc('quarter', t.transitioned_at) = '$quarter'::date
GROUP BY t.issue_key, i.summary, i.assignee, i.priority
ORDER BY 5 DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Blocker Resolution Time per Sprint
panels.description: Average hours to resolve Blocker-priority issues per sprint. Target: ≤ 168h (1 sprint).

targets.rawSql:
SELECT s.name AS "Sprint",
  ROUND(AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (i.resolved_at - i.created_at))/3600.0)::numeric,1) AS "Avg Hours to Resolve"
FROM issues i
JOIN sprint_issues si ON si.issue_key=i.key
JOIN sprints s ON s.id=si.sprint_id
WHERE i.project_key IN ($project) AND i.priority='Blocker'
  AND i.resolved_at IS NOT NULL
  AND date_trunc('quarter', COALESCE(s.complete_date, s.start_date)) = '$quarter'::date
GROUP BY s.name, s.complete_date ORDER BY s.complete_date DESC LIMIT 20

panels.title: Open Blockers
panels.description: Currently open Blocker-priority issues ordered by age.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT key AS "Key", summary AS "Summary",
  COALESCE(assignee,'Unassigned') AS "Assignee",
  status AS "Status",
  DATE_PART('day', NOW()-created_at)::int AS "Age (days)"
FROM issues
WHERE project_key IN ($project) AND priority='Blocker' AND status_category!='Done'
ORDER BY created_at ASC LIMIT 25

panels.title: Sprint Velocity — Committed vs Delivered
panels.description: Story points committed at sprint start vs actually delivered.

targets.rawSql:
SELECT pd.sprint_name AS "Sprint",
  COALESCE(pd.committed_points,0) AS "Committed",
  COALESCE(pd.delivered_points,0) AS "Delivered"
FROM v_planning_deviation pd
WHERE pd.sprint_id IN (SELECT DISTINCT si.sprint_id FROM sprint_issues si JOIN issues i ON i.key=si.issue_key WHERE i.project_key IN ($project))
  AND pd.state='closed'
  AND date_trunc('quarter', COALESCE(pd.complete_date, pd.start_date)) = '$quarter'::date
ORDER BY pd.complete_date DESC LIMIT 20

list.name: project
list.label: Team / Project
list.query: SELECT key FROM projects ORDER BY key

list.name: quarter
list.label: Quarter
list.query: SELECT CONCAT('Q', EXTRACT(QUARTER FROM created_at)::int, ' ', EXTRACT(YEAR FROM created_at)::int) AS __text, TO_CHAR(date_trunc('quarter', created_at), 'YYYY-MM-DD') AS __value FROM issues WHERE created_at IS NOT NULL GROUP BY 1, 2 ORDER BY 2 DESC
